rationale: The cited meta-analysis is used to justify the conceptual importance of adaptive selling orientation and customer orientation in the citing paper's moderator framework. In the covariate selection section, the authors explicitly reference Franke and Park (2006) when motivating why these selling-orientation constructs should be measured and tested in their field experiment. So the citation is not just a passing name check; it supports the theoretical setup of key explanatory variables.
relation_description: The citing paper relies on Franke and Park (2006) as prior evidence that adaptive selling and customer orientation matter in sales outcomes, and uses that foundation to include these orientations as salesperson-level contingencies in its predictive analytics implementation model.
